themes.title: User Behavior Insights
themes.description: Focus on tracking and analyzing user behavior to enhance personalization.

themes.title: User Engagement Features
themes.description: Develop features that enhance user engagement and feedback.

themes.title: Compliance and Data Management
themes.description: Ensure compliance with regulations and manage data effectively.

milestones.name: MVP Completion
milestones.description: Complete the foundational features for user behavior tracking and compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: User behavior tracking pipeline and ML recommendation engine are operational, and GDPR compliance audit preparation is complete.

milestones.name: V1 Feature Rollout
milestones.description: Launch user engagement features including dashboards and cross-device tracking.
milestones.success_criteria: User preference dashboard, cross-device tracking, feedback collection, and privacy settings are implemented and functional.

milestones.name: V2 Compliance and Data Export
milestones.description: Implement data export features for advertisers and monitoring for compliance.
milestones.success_criteria: Data export functionality for advertisers and monitoring alerts for compliance are fully operational.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful completion of the MVP, which establishes the foundational tracking and compliance mechanisms.
V2 features require the successful rollout of V1 features to ensure that user engagement and compliance mechanisms are in place.

mvp.goal: Establish core user behavior tracking and compliance mechanisms.

v1.goal: Enhance user engagement through new features and feedback mechanisms.

v2.goal: Implement data management features and compliance monitoring.
